description: The ItemTextureThumbnailSource component can be used to customize the inventory preview of an item, setting it to a texture.

fields.Texture: The texture that should be used as the item's inventory preview. If null, the component will be ignored.
fields.Crop: The rectangle that defines what section of the image to use. (Or null to use the entire image)

methods.OnEnsureSingleThumbnailSource: All other components of the same type on the hiearchy of this slot will be deleted when this is pressed.

usage: To work, the component needs to be attached to the object's root slot and have an image in its ``Texture``. The ``Ensure single thumbnail source`` button can be used to remove all other instances of the component in the item's hierarchy.
